name: network-safety
description: Block destructive network and infrastructure commands — SSH, firewall, routing, and interface changes
author: sieteunoseis

hooks.name: Block SSH to production devices
hooks.description: Prevents direct SSH sessions to network devices — use read-only tools or get approval first

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^ssh '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: direct SSH to a device. Use a read-only CLI tool or get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block Terraform destroy and taint
hooks.description: Prevents terraform destroy and terraform taint which remove infrastructure

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '(terraform|tofu) (destroy|taint|untaint|force-unlock)'; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: destructive Terraform operation. Review the plan before applying."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block Ansible playbook runs
hooks.description: Prevents ansible-playbook execution without explicit approval — playbooks can change device configs

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^ansible-playbook '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: ansible-playbook can modify device configurations. Get explicit user approval."}'; fi; }

hooks.name: Block SNMP write operations
hooks.description: Prevents snmpset which can modify device configuration via SNMP

hook.command: jq -r '.tool_input.command' | { read -r cmd; if echo "$cmd" | grep -qE '^snmpset '; then echo '{"decision":"block","reason":"BLOCKED: snmpset modifies device configuration via SNMP. Use snmpget/snmpwalk for read-only queries."}'; fi; }
